@@ -1326,7 +1326,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","title":"Implement: terminal grid data model (cells, lines, cursor, modes)","description":"Goal
- Implement the core in-memory model used by the terminal engine.

Requirements
- Cell model: text (grapheme), fg/bg, attrs (bold/italic/underline/etc), hyperlink id, and width.
- Grid model: fixed columns, rows; supports efficient row clears and spans.
- Cursor + modes: wrap, origin, insert, autowrap; plus placeholders for DEC modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests for all basic mutations.
- No panics on edge cases (min size, zero-length operations).
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:58:22.262569874Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T18:58:22.262549566Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","title":"Implement: scrollback + resize/reflow policy","description":"Goal
- Support realistic scrollback and correct behavior under resize.

Requirements
- Scrollback buffer with configurable capacity.
- Clear reflow policy: what happens to wrapped lines on resize.
- Resize invariants: cursor position, viewport, selection (if any), and mode semantics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic replay fixtures for resize storms.
- Bench coverage for resize cost and memory.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:03:09.224829755Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:03:09.224807123Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","title":"Implement: selection model + copy extraction","description":"Goal
- Implement selection primitives (char/cell/word/line) and copy extraction from grid+scrollback.

Requirements
- Coordinate model for selections spanning scrollback and viewport.
- Word selection heuristics tuned for code and paths.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic tests for selection across wrapped lines and resize.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:43:45.355097628Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:43:45.355078763Z","close_reason":"Implemented selection model + copy extraction (Selection/BufferPos) with wrapped+resize tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","title":"Implement: VT/ANSI parser state machine (CSI/OSC/SGR + edits)","description":"Goal
- Implement the output stream parser and apply mutations to the grid.

Must Support (initial)
- CSI cursor moves, erase in line/screen, insert/delete char/line, scroll up/down, set scroll region.
- SGR attributes and colors (16/256/truecolor).
- OSC 0/2 (title) (optional storage) and OSC 8 hyperlinks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Conformance fixtures from bd-lff4p.1.1 replay to exact expected grid snapshots.
- Proptest: parser never panics on arbitrary byte streams.
","notes":"2026-02-08 (SilverHarbor): Added scroll-region + scroll + insert/delete decoding+apply. Parser now decodes DECSTBM (CSI r) -> Action::SetScrollRegion { top (0-index), bottom (exclusive; bottom==0 sentinel=default rows) }, SU/SD (CSI S/T) -> ScrollUp/ScrollDown, IL/DL (CSI L/M) -> InsertLines/DeleteLines, ICH/DCH (CSI @/P) -> InsertChars/DeleteChars. Harness applies these via Cursor::set_scroll_region + home, Grid::{scroll_up_into,scroll_down,insert_lines,delete_lines,insert_chars,delete_chars}. Differential: added supported fixtures csi_scroll_up, csi_scroll_down, csi_scroll_region_and_scroll; rotated known mismatch to csi_ich_insert_chars (VirtualTerminal lacks ICH). Validation: cargo fmt --check; cargo check -p frankenterm-core --all-targets; cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test -p frankenterm-core (all pass).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"NavyCanyon","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:26:21.074140623Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202088217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","title":"Implement: VT/ANSI parser state machine (CSI/OSC/SGR + edits)","description":"Goal
- Implement the output stream parser and apply mutations to the grid.

Must Support (initial)
- CSI cursor moves, erase in line/screen, insert/delete char/line, scroll up/down, set scroll region.
- SGR attributes and colors (16/256/truecolor).
- OSC 0/2 (title) (optional storage) and OSC 8 hyperlinks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Conformance fixtures from bd-lff4p.1.1 replay to exact expected grid snapshots.
- Proptest: parser never panics on arbitrary byte streams.
","notes":"2026-02-08 SilverHarbor: implemented CSI SGR decode (Action::Sgr) and OSC 0/2/8 decode (Action::SetTitle / HyperlinkStart / HyperlinkEnd); added SgrAttrs::apply_sgr_params (16/256/truecolor + resets) + unit tests; updated differential harnesses + proptest apply_action for new variants; fixed workspace clippy by tightening Sides sum invariant assertions; full quality gates green: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"NavyCanyon","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:57:21.850331545Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202088217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","title":"Implement: hyperlink registry (OSC 8) + click mapping","description":"Goal
- Track OSC 8 hyperlinks in a compact registry and expose hit-testing hooks for the web renderer.

Acceptance Criteria
- Fixtures cover overlapping hyperlinks, resets, and clear-on-scroll behavior.
- API supports mapping cell->url efficiently.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:02.076522360Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:42:33.837962633Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:42:33.837944259Z","close_reason":"Implemented HyperlinkRegistry + click mapping; Scrollback eviction hook + tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:02.076522360Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:17:57.102713817Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:17:57.400830719Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","title":"Implement: incremental patch API for renderer (dirty spans, diff runs)","description":"Goal
- Provide an efficient change representation so renderers can update incrementally.

Requirements
- Dirty tracking at row + span granularity.
- Stable, deterministic patch ordering.
- APIs designed for both WebGPU and native present paths.

Acceptance Criteria
- Benchmarks demonstrate sub-linear updates for typical workloads.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:07.608920515Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:10:40.965383507Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:10:40.965364181Z","close_reason":"Completed: DirtyTracker + GridDiff + ChangeRun + enhanced Patch (132 tests)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:07.608920515Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:07.608920515Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:07.608920515Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.9","title":"Test: proptest invariants for grid + parser (never panic; stable semantics)","description":"Goal
- Add property tests that make it safe to aggressively optimize and refactor.

Invariants (examples)
- Cursor always within bounds.
- Lines never exceed width in cell count.
- Parser accepts arbitrary bytes without panic.
- Applying a patch preserves semantic equality vs full recompute.

Acceptance Criteria
- Tests run in CI with fixed seeds + shrinkable counterexamples.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.9","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:13.480485759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
@@ -1355,7 +1355,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","title":"Optional: auto URL detection (non-OSC8) + safe click handling","description":"Goal
- Detect plain-text URLs in the viewport/scrollback and make them clickable (similar to xterm.js WebLinks addon).

Scope
- Heuristics tuned to avoid false positives in code.
- Security: sanitize and enforce allowed protocols.

Testing
- Fixture corpus for common URL forms.
- E2E: click opens expected target (or emits link event) with JSONL logs.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:19:16.284093147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:19:16.284093147Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:19:16.284093147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:19:16.284093147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:19:16.284093147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","title":"Implement: WebGPU renderer skeleton (device init + background cell quads)","description":"Goal
- Get pixels on screen: render the terminal background + cell backgrounds at interactive speeds.

Requirements
- WebGPU init (adapter/device/queue) + resize handling.
- Draw pass for background and per-cell bg colors.
- Path for applying dirty-span patches only (no full redraw required).

Acceptance Criteria
- A minimal web harness can render a synthetic grid and resize without artifacts.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseStream","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908139015Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908120100Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1012,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WebGPU renderer skeleton complete (4fff96e9). Implements ADR-009: wgpu device init + surface config, instanced cell quad pipeline (storage buffer + WGSL shader), dirty-span patch updates via queue.write_buffer, resize handling with buffer rebuild, 4 unit tests. Text rendering deferred to bd-lff4p.2.5.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:55Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","title":"Implement: glyph rasterization + atlas cache (monospace first)","description":"Goal
- Turn glyphs into atlas textures with stable metrics and minimal overhead.

Requirements
- Start with monospace ASCII + box drawing + common symbols; expand to full Unicode coverage via bd-lff4p.2.18.
- Deterministic glyph keys/ids across runs and platforms (within a given font build).
- Cache with explicit eviction policy + metrics (hit/miss, bytes, upload cost).
- Hot path: no allocations when glyph already cached.

Testing
- Unit tests for key stability and eviction invariants.
- Golden fixtures for a representative glyph set (metrics + atlas coordinates).
- Bench harness integration to measure cache miss cost and steady-state throughput.

Acceptance Criteria
- Benchable API: given a glyph key, returns atlas coords and advances with no allocations in hot path.
- Upload + packing strategy is measurable and regression-gated.
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:09:31.782856563Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","title":"Implement: WebGPU text rendering (atlas + instanced quads)","description":"Goal
- Render terminal text cells using the glyph atlas and an instanced quad pipeline.

Requirements
- Respect per-cell fg color + attrs (bold/italic/underline as feasible).
- Handle wide glyphs and combining marks (at least gracefully).

Acceptance Criteria
- 120x40 grid @ 60fps with typical demo workloads on modern desktop.
- Instrumented frame timing (CPU submit + GPU time if possible).
","notes":"2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: wired true glyph-atlas texture sampling path in frankenterm-web renderer. Added atlas texture/sampler + glyph metadata storage buffer bindings in WGSL/pipeline; patch application now resolves glyph ids into atlas slots and uploads atlas/metadata on demand; renderer now samples atlas alpha per cell for fg ink (with underline/strikethrough attrs). Added public atlas pixel exposure in glyph_atlas for GPU upload bridge. Current glyph raster source is deterministic procedural fallback; awaiting bd-lff4p.2.4 final raster/metadata contract to swap in production font rasterization.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: follow-up polish: batch atlas upload once per apply_patches (avoid N× full-atlas uploads when many new glyphs appear in one frame), treat whitespace as glyph_id=0 (no atlas slot), and key glyph slot mapping by GlyphKey (codepoint+px_size) with redundant glyph_meta writes avoided via CPU-side equality check.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IndigoRaven","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:29:45.208227954Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","title":"Implement: WebGPU text rendering (atlas + instanced quads)","description":"Goal
- Render terminal text cells using the glyph atlas and an instanced quad pipeline.

Requirements
- Respect per-cell fg color + attrs (bold/italic/underline as feasible).
- Handle wide glyphs and combining marks (at least gracefully).

Acceptance Criteria
- 120x40 grid @ 60fps with typical demo workloads on modern desktop.
- Instrumented frame timing (CPU submit + GPU time if possible).
","notes":"2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: wired true glyph-atlas texture sampling path in frankenterm-web renderer. Added atlas texture/sampler + glyph metadata storage buffer bindings in WGSL/pipeline; patch application now resolves glyph ids into atlas slots and uploads atlas/metadata on demand; renderer now samples atlas alpha per cell for fg ink (with underline/strikethrough attrs). Added public atlas pixel exposure in glyph_atlas for GPU upload bridge. Current glyph raster source is deterministic procedural fallback; awaiting bd-lff4p.2.4 final raster/metadata contract to swap in production font rasterization.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: follow-up polish: batch atlas upload once per apply_patches (avoid N× full-atlas uploads when many new glyphs appear in one frame), treat whitespace as glyph_id=0 (no atlas slot), and key glyph slot mapping by GlyphKey (codepoint+px_size) with redundant glyph_meta writes avoided via CPU-side equality check.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: round cell pixel sizes in WebGpuRenderer init/resize so viewport+cell metrics stay aligned on fractional DPR (avoids subtle drift/stretched quads under zoom).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IndigoRaven","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:55:43.051613842Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.6","title":"Implement: cursor + selection + hyperlink hover/click rendering","description":"Goal
- Make the terminal feel interactive: cursor, selection visualization, and hyperlink affordances.

Requirements
- Cursor rendering styles: block, bar, underline.
- Selection rendering + copy.
- Hyperlink hover underline + click dispatch.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic visual tests (golden images or checksumable framebuffer dumps).

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","title":"Implement: web input capture layer (keyboard/mouse/touch)","description":"Goal
- Capture browser input events and feed them into the ftui/FrankenTerm world with minimal latency and deterministic semantics.

Requirements
- Keyboard
  - consistent modifier semantics across browsers/OS
  - repeat handling
  - special keys and function keys
  - composition events integrate with IME plan (bd-lff4p.2.9)
- Mouse
  - click/drag/wheel with correct cell coordinates (respects DPR + font metrics)
  - selection gestures
- Touch
  - tap, long-press, scroll; optional pinch zoom

Testing + Logging
- Unit tests for key mapping tables and edge cases (Ctrl/Alt/Meta/Super).
- Property tests for modifier state machines (no stuck modifiers; idempotent focus loss).
- E2E scripts emit JSONL: event counts, encoded bytes (when relevant), and any mapping fallbacks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic event encoding suitable for record/replay.
- No key ghosting; no stuck modifiers; focus changes handled correctly.
","notes":"NavyCanyon is actively implementing frankenterm-web input schema/module + tests; asked others to avoid overlapping edits in crates/frankenterm-web until push (see Agent Mail thread bd-lff4p.2.7).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271201447Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271180678Z","close_reason":"Implemented input schema + wasm glue (key/mouse/wheel/touch/composition/focus) with stable JSON encoding + tests; wasm32 check passes","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","title":"Implement: clipboard integration (copy/paste) for frankenterm-web","description":"Goal
- Implement copy and paste behaviors expected from a modern terminal.

Acceptance Criteria
- Copy uses selection model; paste injects as input stream.
- Works across Chrome/Safari/Firefox within their security constraints.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.6","title":"Alien Artifact: formal cost models for caches + scheduling (renderer + parser)","description":"Goal
- Use principled math to design cache eviction, batching, and scheduling with explicit objective functions.

Examples
- Explicit loss functions for cache misses vs memory.
- Queueing/scheduling model for input vs render vs present.
- Evidence ledger: why a policy was chosen, with measured priors/posteriors.

Acceptance Criteria
- Documented models + experiments that justify the final policies.
- Results integrated into code comments and perf docs.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.7","title":"Optional: differential testing against reference terminal emulators","description":"Goal
- Validate FrankenTerm correctness via differential testing.

Approach
- Feed identical output byte streams to multiple reference emulators.
- Compare resulting grid snapshots and cursor state to FrankenTerm.

Acceptance Criteria
- Differential mismatches become tracked fixtures with root-cause notes.
","notes":"Progress (2026-02-08):
- Added differential harness: crates/frankenterm-core/tests/differential_terminal.rs comparing frankenterm-core parser-driven state against ftui_pty::virtual_terminal::VirtualTerminal (normalized grid text + cursor position).
- Added second independent reference harness: crates/frankenterm-core/tests/differential_extras_reference.rs comparing core against ftui_extras::terminal::TerminalState (driven by ftui_extras::terminal::AnsiParser).
- Added tracked known-mismatch ledger: tests/fixtures/vt-conformance/differential/known_mismatches.tsv (currently tracks csi_ich_insert_chars: ICH implemented by frankenterm-core but missing in the VirtualTerminal reference), plus a guard test ensuring known mismatches continue to mismatch.
- Documented both harnesses in docs/spec/frankenterm-correctness.md section 5.1.

Validation:
- cargo fmt --check
- cargo check --all-targets
- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core (incl. differential harnesses + proptest invariants)
- cargo test -p ftui-extras --features terminal-widget --test terminal_integration","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"NavyMoose","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:50.160468658Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:30:07.478847754Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T22:30:07.478823699Z","close_reason":"Completed: multi-reference differential harness (VirtualTerminal + ftui-extras) + known-mismatch ledger + docs + tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:50.160468658Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:50.160468658Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","title":"QA: extend shared JSONL schema/logging for web + remote terminal sessions","description":"Goal
- Reuse and extend the existing E2E logging infrastructure (`tests/e2e/lib/logging.sh`, schema/validator) so FrankenTerm web + remote sessions produce first-class, debuggable artifacts.

Scope
- Extend `tests/e2e/lib/e2e_jsonl_schema.json` for:
  - browser identity, DPR, GPU adapter info (when available)
  - patch/frame hashes and patch sizes
  - websocket wire counters + latency histograms
- Update validator and examples without breaking existing logs.

Acceptance Criteria
- All new web/remote E2E scripts validate cleanly.
- Logs are detailed enough to diagnose a mismatch without reproducing locally.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CyanTower","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:18.925074668Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:21:10.186309794Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:21:10.186287933Z","close_reason":"Implemented browser/webgpu/ws + frame/patch fields in E2E JSONL schema + logging helpers; updated validator self-tests, examples, and e2e schema doc","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:18.925074668Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:15:00.983605166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:18.925074668Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
